lines.speaker: Finn
lines.text: How are you finding the Conch so far?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Very nice, thank you. It's a remarkable island you have here.

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.text: It is, isn't it? Still, I must admit, I'm keen to get out into the wider world. Coco and Torgan say it won't be long now until it's time for my Trial by Water.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, in that case, I wish you good luck.
